title: Her Majesty's Prime Ministers: John Major
original_title: Her Majesty's Prime Ministers: John Major
overview: As a school dropout, the teenage John Major could simply never have dreamt that he would one day become a powerful political leader and get elected as Britain's Prime Minister. Major became Her Majesty's ninth Prime Minister.
